tasmax.comment: maximum near-surface (usually, 2 meter) air temperature (add cell_method attribute 'time: max')

tasmin.comment: minimum near-surface (usually, 2 meter) air temperature (add cell_method attribute 'time: min')

pr.comment: includes both liquid and solid phases

evspsbl.comment: Evaporation at surface (also known as evapotranspiration): flux of water into the atmosphere due to conversion of both liquid and solid phases to vapor (from underlying surface and vegetation)

hurs.comment: The relative humidity with respect to liquid water for T> 0 C, and with respect to ice for T<0 C.

ps.comment: surface pressure (not mean sea-level pressure), 2-D field to calculate the 3-D pressure field from hybrid coordinates

uas.comment: Eastward component of the near-surface (usually, 10 meters)  wind

vas.comment: Northward component of the near surface wind

clt.comment: Total cloud area fraction (reported as a percentage) for the whole atmospheric column, as seen from the surface or the top of the atmosphere. Includes both large-scale and convective cloud.

rsds.comment: Surface solar irradiance for UV calculations.

rlds.comment: The surface called 'surface' means the lower boundary of the atmosphere. 'longwave' means longwave radiation. Downwelling radiation is radiation from above. It does not mean 'net downward'. When thought of as being incident on a surface, a radiative flux is sometimes called 'irradiance'. In addition, it is identical with the quantity measured by a cosine-collector light-meter and sometimes called 'vector irradiance'. In accordance with common usage in geophysical disciplines, 'flux' implies per unit area, called 'flux density' in physics.

ts.comment: Temperature of the lower boundary of the atmosphere

tsl.cell_methods: area: mean where land time: mean
tsl.comment: Temperature of soil. Reported as missing for grid cells with no land.

prc.comment: Convective precipitation at surface; includes both liquid and solid phases.

prhmax.cell_methods: area: mean time: mean within hours time: maximum over hours
prhmax.comment: In accordance with common usage in geophysical disciplines, 'flux' implies per unit area, called 'flux density' in physics.

prsn.comment: At surface; includes precipitation of all forms of water in the solid phase

mrros.cell_methods: area: mean where land time: mean
mrros.comment: The total surface run off leaving the land portion of the grid cell (excluding drainage through the base of the soil model).

mrro.cell_methods: area: mean where land time: mean
mrro.comment: The total run-off (including drainage through the base of the soil model) per unit area leaving the land portion of the grid cell.

snm.cell_methods: area: mean where land time: mean
snm.comment: The total surface snow melt rate on the land portion of the grid cell divided by the land area in the grid cell; report as zero for snow-free land regions and missing where there is no land.

tauu.comment: Downward eastward wind stress at the surface

tauv.comment: Downward northward wind stress at the surface

sfcWindmax.comment: Daily maximum near-surface (usually, 10 meters) wind speed.

rsus.comment: The surface called 'surface' means the lower boundary of the atmosphere. 'shortwave' means shortwave radiation. Upwelling radiation is radiation from below. It does not mean 'net upward'. When thought of as being incident on a surface, a radiative flux is sometimes called 'irradiance'. In addition, it is identical with the quantity measured by a cosine-collector light-meter and sometimes called 'vector irradiance'. In accordance with common usage in geophysical disciplines, 'flux' implies per unit area, called 'flux density' in physics.

rlus.comment: The surface called 'surface' means the lower boundary of the atmosphere. 'longwave' means longwave radiation. Upwelling radiation is radiation from below. It does not mean 'net upward'. When thought of as being incident on a surface, a radiative flux is sometimes called 'irradiance'. In addition, it is identical with the quantity measured by a cosine-collector light-meter and sometimes called 'vector irradiance'. In accordance with common usage in geophysical disciplines, 'flux' implies per unit area, called 'flux density' in physics.

rlut.comment: at the top of the atmosphere (to be compared with satellite measurements)

rsdt.comment: Shortwave radiation incident at the top of the atmosphere

rsut.comment: at the top of the atmosphere

hfls.comment: The surface called 'surface' means the lower boundary of the atmosphere. 'Upward' indicates a vector component which is positive when directed upward (negative downward). The surface latent heat flux is the exchange of heat between the surface and the air on account of evaporation (including sublimation). In accordance with common usage in geophysical disciplines, 'flux' implies per unit area, called 'flux density' in physics.

hfss.comment: The surface sensible heat flux, also called turbulent heat flux, is the exchange of heat between the surface and the air by motion of air.

mrfso.cell_methods: area: mean where land time: mean

mrfsos.cell_methods: area: mean where land time: mean
mrfsos.long_name: Frozen Water Content in Upper Portion of Soil Column

mrsfl.cell_methods: area: mean where land time: mean
mrsfl.long_name: Frozen Water Content of Soil Layer
mrsfl.comment: in each soil layer, the mass of water in ice phase.  Reported as 'missing' for grid cells occupied entirely by 'sea'

mrso.cell_methods: area: mean where land time: mean
mrso.comment: the mass per unit area  (summed over all soil layers) of water in all phases.

mrsos.cell_methods: area: mean where land time: mean
mrsos.long_name: Moisture in Upper Portion of Soil Column
mrsos.comment: The mass of water in all phases in the upper 10cm of the  soil layer.

mrsol.cell_methods: area: mean where land time: mean
mrsol.long_name: Total Water Content of Soil Layer
mrsol.comment: in each soil layer, the mass of water in all phases, including ice.  Reported as 'missing' for grid cells occupied entirely by 'sea'

snw.cell_methods: area: mean where land time: mean
snw.comment: The mass of surface snow on the land portion of the grid cell divided by the land area in the grid cell; reported as missing where the land fraction is 0; excludes snow on vegetation canopy or on sea ice.

snc.comment: Percentage of each grid cell that is occupied by snow that rests on land portion of cell.

snd.cell_methods: area: mean where land time: mean
snd.comment: where land over land, this is computed as the mean thickness of snow in the land portion of the grid cell (averaging over the entire land portion, including the snow-free fraction).  Reported as 0.0 where the land fraction is 0.

siconca.comment: Percentage of grid cell covered by sea ice

zmla.comment: The atmosphere boundary layer thickness is the 'depth' or 'height' of the (atmosphere) planetary boundary layer.

prw.comment: vertically integrated through the atmospheric column

clwvi.comment: Mass of condensed (liquid + ice) water in the column divided by the area of the column (not just the area of the cloudy portion of the column). Includes precipitating hydrometeors ONLY if the precipitating hydrometeors affect the calculation of radiative transfer in model.

clivi.comment: mass of ice water in the column divided by the area of the column (not just the area of the cloudy portion of the column). Includes precipitating frozen hydrometeors ONLY if the precipitating hydrometeor affects the calculation of radiative transfer in model.

hus850.comment: Specific humidity is the mass fraction of water vapor in (moist) air.

zg1000.comment: Geopotential height on the 1000 hPa surface

zg500.comment: geopotential height on the 500 hPa surface

evspsblpot.cell_methods: area: mean where land time: mean
evspsblpot.comment: at surface; potential flux of water into the atmosphere due to conversion of both liquid and solid phases to vapor (from underlying surface and vegetation)

wsgsmax.long_name: Daily Maximum Near-Surface Wind Speed of Gust

rsdscs.comment: Surface solar irradiance clear sky for UV calculations

rsutcs.comment: Calculated in the absence of clouds.

rlutcs.comment: Upwelling clear-sky longwave radiation at top of atmosphere

capemax.long_name: Daily Maximum Convective Available Potential Energy

ua10.comment: Zonal wind on the 10 hPa surface

zg100.comment: Geopotential height on the 100 hPa surface

zos.cell_methods: area: mean where sea time: mean
zos.comment: This is the dynamic sea level, so should have zero global area mean. It should not include inverse barometer depressions from sea ice.

tos.cell_methods: area: mean where sea time: mean
tos.comment: Temperature of upper boundary of the liquid ocean, including temperatures below sea-ice and floating ice shelves.

sos.cell_methods: area: mean where sea time: mean
sos.comment: Sea water salinity is the salt content of sea water, often on the Practical Salinity Scale of 1978. However, the unqualified term 'salinity' is generic and does not necessarily imply any particular method of calculation. The units of salinity are dimensionless and the units attribute should normally be given as 1e-3 or 0.001 i.e. parts per thousand.

mlotst.cell_methods: area: mean where sea time: mean
mlotst.long_name: Ocean Mixed Layer Thickness Defined by Sigma T
mlotst.comment: Sigma T is potential density referenced to ocean surface.

thetao.cell_methods: area: mean where sea time: mean
thetao.comment: Diagnostic should be contributed even for models using conservative temperature as prognostic field.

hfds.cell_methods: area: mean where sea time: mean
hfds.long_name: Downward Heat Flux at Sea Water Surface
hfds.comment: This is the net flux of heat entering the liquid water column through its upper surface (excluding any 'flux adjustment') .

hfcorr.cell_methods: area: mean where sea time: mean
hfcorr.comment: Flux correction is also called 'flux adjustment'. A positive flux correction is downward i.e. added to the ocean. In accordance with common usage in geophysical disciplines, 'flux' implies per unit area, called 'flux density' in physics.

rsntds.cell_methods: area: mean where sea time: mean
rsntds.long_name: Net Downward Shortwave Radiation at Sea Water Surface
rsntds.comment: This is the flux into the surface of liquid sea water only. This excludes shortwave flux absorbed by sea ice, but includes any light that passes through the ice and is absorbed by the ocean.

tauuo.cell_methods: area: mean where sea time: mean
tauuo.long_name: Sea Water Surface Downward X Stress
tauuo.comment: This is the stress on the liquid ocean from overlying atmosphere, sea ice, ice shelf, etc.

tauvo.cell_methods: area: mean where sea time: mean
tauvo.long_name: Sea Water Surface Downward Y Stress
tauvo.comment: This is the stress on the liquid ocean from overlying atmosphere, sea ice, ice shelf, etc.

uos.cell_methods: area: mean where sea time: mean

vos.cell_methods: area: mean where sea time: mean

wfo.cell_methods: area: mean where sea time: mean
wfo.comment: Computed as the water flux into the ocean divided by the area of the ocean portion of the grid cell. This is the sum *wfonocorr* and *wfcorr*.

friver.cell_methods: area: mean where sea time: mean
friver.long_name: Water Flux into Sea Water from Rivers
friver.comment: computed as the river flux of water into the ocean divided by the area of the ocean portion of the grid cell.

wfonocorr.cell_methods: area: mean where sea time: mean
wfonocorr.long_name: Water Flux into Sea Water Without Flux Correction
wfonocorr.comment: Computed as the water flux (without flux correction) into the ocean divided by the area of the ocean portion of the grid cell.

so.cell_methods: area: mean where sea time: mean
so.comment: Sea water salinity is the salt content of sea water, often on the Practical Salinity Scale of 1978. However, the unqualified term 'salinity' is generic and does not necessarily imply any particular method of calculation. The units of salinity are dimensionless and the units attribute should normally be given as 1e-3 or 0.001 i.e. parts per thousand.

uo.cell_methods: area: mean where sea time: mean
uo.comment: Prognostic x-ward velocity component resolved by the model.

vo.cell_methods: area: mean where sea time: mean
vo.comment: Prognostic y-ward velocity component resolved by the model.

wo.cell_methods: area: mean where sea time: mean
wo.comment: A velocity is a vector quantity. 'Upward' indicates a vector component which is positive when directed upward (negative downward).

rhop.cell_methods: area: mean where sea time: mean

difvho.cell_methods: area: mean where sea time: mean

tob.cell_methods: area: mean where sea time: mean
tob.long_name: Sea Water Potential Temperature at Sea Floor
tob.comment: Potential temperature at the ocean bottom-most grid cell.

siconc.cell_methods: area: mean where sea time: mean
siconc.comment: Percentage of grid cell covered by sea ice

sithick.cell_methods: area: time: mean where sea_ice (comment: mask=siconc)
sithick.comment: Actual (floe) thickness of sea ice (NOT volume divided by grid area as was done in CMIP5)

sitemptop.cell_methods: area: time: mean where sea_ice (comment: mask=siconc)
sitemptop.comment: Report surface temperature of snow where snow covers the sea ice.

abs550aer.long_name: Ambient Aerosol Absorption Optical Thickness at 550 nm

od550bc.long_name: Black Carbon Aerosol Optical Thickness at 550nm

od550oa.long_name: Organic Matter Aerosol Optical Thickness at 550nm

ssa550aer.long_name: Aerosol Single Scattering Albedo at 550 nm

abs350aer.long_name: Ambient Aerosol Absorption Optical Thickness at 350 nm

abs440aer.long_name: Ambient Aerosol Absorption Optical Thickness at 440 nm

abs870aer.long_name: Ambient Aerosol Absorption Optical Thickness at 870 nm

drybc.long_name: Dry Deposition Rate of Black Carbon

dryoa.long_name: Dry Deposition Rate of Organic Matter

emibc.long_name: Total Emission Rate of Black Carbon
emibc.comment: daily output only if daily variations in emissions

emidust.comment: daily output only if daily variations in emissions

eminh3.comment: daily output only if daily variations in emissions

eminox.comment: daily output only if daily variations in emissions

emioa.long_name: Total Emission Rate of Organic Matter
emioa.comment: daily output only if daily variations in emissions

emiso2.long_name: Total Emission Rate of Sulfure Dioxide
emiso2.comment: daily output only if daily variations in emissions

emiso4.comment: daily output only if daily variations in emissions

emiss.comment: daily output only if daily variations in emissions

emivoc.comment: daily output only if daily variations in emissions

od550lt1aer.long_name: Ambient Fine Aerosol Optical Thickness at 550nm

od550soa.long_name: Secondary Organic Aerosol Optical Thickness at 550nm

rsutcsaf.long_name: TOA Outgoing Clear-Sky, Aerosol-Free Shortwave Radiation

rlutcsaf.long_name: TOA Outgoing Clear-Sky, Aerosol-Free Longwave Radiation

rsdscsaf.long_name: Surface Downwelling Clear-Sky, Aerosol-Free Shortwave Radiation

rsuscsaf.long_name: Surface Upwelling Clear-Sky, Aerosol-Free Shortwave Radiation

rldscsaf.long_name: Surface Downwelling Clear-Sky, Aerosol-Free Longwave Radiation

rluscsaf.long_name: Surface Upwelling Clear-Sky, Aerosol-Free Longwave Radiation

sconcoa.long_name: Surface Concentration of Organic Matter Aerosol

sconcsoa.long_name: Surface Concentration of Secondary Organic Aerosol

sedbc.comment: only if sedimentation is applied for this aerosol

seddust.comment: only if sedimentation is applied for this aerosol

sednh4.comment: only if sedimentation is applied for this aerosol

sedno3.comment: only if sedimentation is applied for this aerosol

sedoa.comment: only if sedimentation is applied for this aerosol

sedso4.comment: only if sedimentation is applied for this aerosol

sedss.comment: only if sedimentation is applied for this aerosol

ssa1000aer.long_name: Aerosol Single Scattering Albedo at 1000 nm

ssa350aer.long_name: Aerosol Single Scattering Albedo at 350 nm

ssa440aer.long_name: Aerosol Single Scattering Albedo at 440 nm

ssa870aer.long_name: Aerosol Single Scattering Albedo at 870 nm

wetbc.long_name: Wet Deposition Rate of Black Carbon

wetoa.long_name: Wet Deposition Rate of Organic Matter
